## Summary

Describe why this change is needed and what behavior it affects.

## Risk Level

- [ ] low
- [ ] medium
- [ ] high

## Rollout Plan

Describe how this change will be deployed (sequence, scope, and guardrails).

## Rollback Plan

Describe how to revert this change quickly and safely.

## Verification Evidence

Include executed commands, logs, screenshots, traces, or test outputs.

## GGA Findings and Waiver (Required if Applicable)

- Findings summary:
- Waiver justification:
- Waiver approver:
- Waiver expiration/review date:

If no waiver is required, write `N/A` in each waiver field.

## Checklist

- [ ] Local quality gate executed (`./scripts/quality-gate.sh`)
- [ ] Documentation updated if behavior/process changed
- [ ] Hotfix back-merge plan included when using `hotfix/*`
